# Wright AI

> The Documentation Intelligence Platform — the AI code documentation tool that never lies.

Wright AI is built around three pillars: Generate (auto-generate docstrings for Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, and Rust), Verify (detect drift so documentation never lies), and Understand (expose your codebase to AI assistants via MCP so Claude Code, Cursor, and Copilot always have a reliable source of truth). Available as a VS Code extension, CLI tool, GitHub Action, and MCP server.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.wrightai.live): Product overview, install instructions, and feature highlights
- [Documentation](https://www.wrightai.live/docs): Full reference for the CLI, VS Code extension, GitHub Action, and MCP server
- [Pricing](https://www.wrightai.live/pricing): Free and paid plan details
- [Python Docstring Generator](https://www.wrightai.live/python): Auto-generate Python docstrings in Google, NumPy, or epytext style
- [TypeScript JSDoc Generator](https://www.wrightai.live/typescript): Auto-generate JSDoc comments for TypeScript functions and classes
- [JavaScript Documentation Generator](https://www.wrightai.live/javascript): Auto-generate JSDoc for JavaScript projects
- [Go Documentation Generator](https://www.wrightai.live/go): Auto-generate godoc-style line comments for Go functions
- [Rust Documentation Generator](https://www.wrightai.live/rust): Auto-generate rustdoc /// comments for Rust functions

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.wrightai.live/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.wrightai.live/terms-of-service)
- [Refund Policy](https://www.wrightai.live/refund-policy)

## Product

- Name: Wright AI
- License: AGPL-3.0 (free); commercial license available
- Pricing: Free to start — VS Code extension, CLI, and MCP server are fully free
- Install (CLI): pip install wright
- Install (VS Code): https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=WrightAI.wrightai
- Source: https://github.com/surajs1999/WrightAI
- Package: https://pypi.org/project/wright/

## Features

- Auto-generate docstrings for Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, and Rust
- Documentation drift detection — flags stale docstrings when function signatures change
- VS Code CodeLens, gutter icons, and diff preview
- GitHub Action for CI coverage enforcement
- MCP server for Claude Code, Cursor, and Copilot integration
- llms.txt generation for your own codebase
- Codebase chat with file:line citations
